# AI-related: usr/share/mios/mios.toml, tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py, mios-open-webui.container
# /usr/share/containers/systemd/mios-ai-ui.pod
# Web interface for the AI stack.
# Members (each member .container declares Pod=mios-ai-ui.pod):
#   mios-open-webui
[Unit]
Description='MiOS' AI Web UI pod
After=network-online.target hermes-agent.service
Wants=network-online.target hermes-agent.service

[Pod]
PodName=mios-ai-ui
Network=mios.network
PublishPort=3030:8080

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
